heroImage: https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/7/7d/1952_Ferrari_212_Europa_Cabriolet_by_Pinin_Farina%2C_front_left_%28Greenwich_2021%29.jpg/1920px-1952 Ferrari 212 Europa Cabriolet by Pinin Farina, front left (Greenwich 2021).jpg
description: The Ferrari 212 Inter, produced from 1951 to 1953, featured a 2.6-litre Colombo V12. Offered in both road and competition forms, the 212 helped establish Ferrari as a maker of desirable grand touring cars.
